---
title: "SCHF001: Philosophy Lab for Human Flourishing – Spring 2026"
subtitle: "An Experiential Literature Program in Applied Philosophy through MMOs"
---

### Enter the Star Citizen Universe: Pyro & Nyx Ethical Frontier

Quantum Jump to the Frontier of Reality: A lawless Pyro raid on Ruin Station or Nyx smuggling run through Glaciem Ring (ambient Star Citizen Pyro/Nyx gameplay loop – immersive 4K footage of contested zones, asteroid belts, and faction skirmishes)

### 🎯 Learning Objectives

Hone ethical reasoning via Reality+ simulations in Star Citizen's Pyro (chaos) & Nyx (rebellion) \
Forge moral attachments & virtues (empathy, resilience, self-sufficiency) through ITC-aligned raids & hauls \
Master digital literacy & STEAM skills in high-stakes MMO ops for veterans/early career pros \
Translate virtual flourishing to real-world impact: Hobbesian wars, Rawlsian justice, Chalmers' virtual minds \

Strap in, pioneer. You're not just logging into Star Citizen—you're spawning into David Chalmers' Reality+: a simulated universe where Pyro's gang turfs (Xenothreat terrorists, CFP settlers, Headhunters outlaws) test "might vs. right," and Nyx's People's Alliance in Levski debates anti-oligarchy ethics amid Glaciem Ring ambushes.

Your ITC Guild Role: Join as traders/security for Interstellar Trading Corporation (ITCN)—bait pirates, raid contested zones (Orbituary, Checkmate, Ruin for compboards 1-7), smuggle for rebels, hunt Vanduul. Gear up: Heavy Marine Armor, Medium Hercs, ROC miners, fighters.

Every 45-60min event from CRU-L1/Pyro gates or Nyx jump points ends in Discord debrief: "Does chaos breed flourishing?" Roll d20 for choices. Veterans: Channel resilience in flare storms. Early career: Navigate corporate aid to rebels.
By week's end, embody philosophers in pixels—Reality+ blurs sim/reality as you vault exec hangars or evade UEE patrols.
Course Text

***Core Text (Summer 2026):*** Chalmers, David. 2022. Reality+: Virtual Worlds and the Problems of Philosophy. W.W. Norton. (Weekly chapters: Ch. 1-2 simulation hypothesis for Pyro spawns; Ch. 3-5 virtual actions in raids; Ch. 6-8 minds/consciousness for Nyx ethics. E-book/PDF excerpts for accessibility.)

### Supplementary Materials

* MMO: Star Citizen Alpha/PTU (free fly events or partnerships for SCHF fleet; focus Pyro/Nyx).
* Gear/Loadouts: Provided via esports lab/PC donations (Heavy Armor, traders/fighters, ROCs).
* Tools: Discord for guild/polls, journals, Google Forms (pre/post virtue surveys), Reality+ audio summaries.
* Philosophy PDFs: Aristotle (eudaimonia), Hobbes/Rawls hooks.

### SCHF-Aligned ITC Gameplay in Pyro & Nyx

* Pyro: Lawless chaos for high-risk raids (contested zones: Orbituary/Checkmate/Ruin).
* Nyx: Anti-oligarchy smuggling/Vanduul hunts (Levski hub, Glaciem Ring). 45-60min events amplify Reality+ with ITC trading/security + SCHF philosophy.

### Pyro Gameplay (Gang Turf Wars & Contested Raids)

Pyro's decayed moons (Pyro IV/V mining: quant/riccite/taranite), flares, hotspots for brutal ops.

| Event Type | Announce Example | Mechanics & SCHF Hook |
|---|---|---|
| Faction Raid: CFP vs. Xenothreat | ITC SCHF Pyro Turf War! 50min PTR from CRU-L1. Assault Ruin/Checkmate for Boards 1-7 & hangar ships. CFP "justice" or Xeno "might"? Heavy Armor + Fireteams! Debrief: Might make right? | Fireteams hit CZs (puzzles/FPS). Collect 7 compboards for exec vault (unique ships). Philosophy: Social contract—anonymous loot vote (Rawls Veil). Ties CFP "retake outposts." Reality+: Virtual actions = real ethics? | | Bait & Mine Ambush | SCHF Mining Gambit! 50min PMG. Escort miners Pyro V/Terminus (riccite), bait pirates. Armor + ROCs/Medium Haulers! Prudence or greed? | Mine hotspots (Bloom/Terminus), defend gangs. ITC inspects. Virtue ethics: Courage in flares vs. temperance. Loot RABs (scorched gear). |
| Outpost Purge | Weekly SCHF Purge! Shepard's Rest/Pyro IV bunkers for loot/boards. Marine loadouts! Reclaim or raze? | Merc missions (6+), PvP. Epistemology: Verify "pirate" intel. High loot (red boxes/armor). |

### Nyx Gameplay (Rebel Smuggling & Frontier Defense)

Glaciem Ring (dense asteroids/Levski), Keeger Belt for ITC "corporate aid" to People's Alliance.

| Event Type | Announce Example | Mechanics & SCHF Hook |
|---|---|---|
| Smuggler's Run | ITC SCHF Nyx Contraband Haul! 50min NSR Pyro/Nyx gate. Levski-Delamar cargo, evade patrols. Medium Hercs + Escorts! Ends justify means? | Procedural hauls (Stanton-Pyro-Nyx), illegal mods. Utilitarianism: Sacrifice scout? People's Alliance anti-UEE. Reality+: Moral knowledge in simulations? |
| Vanduul Hunt & Derelict Dive | SCHF Sworn Enemies Raid! Clear QV/Glaciem for Vanduul tech (Stinger/Glaive). Armor + Fighters! Alien threat real? | "Sworn Enemies" chain: FPS/ship combat. Metaphysics: Nebula illusions. Loot branches. |
| Levski Tribunal Escort | Nyx Justice Convoy! Escort activists to Levski vs. UEE. Traders + Marines! Rawls fair rules? | Role-play trials. Political philosophy: Anti-oligarchy. PvP ring, mine cover. |


### SCHF

| Aspect | Pyro Focus | Nyx Focus |
|---|---|---|
| Risk Level | Extreme (no crime stats, PvP CZs/hotspots) | High (Vanduul/ambushes; gray security) |
| Loot/Profits | Compboards/ships/mining (taranite)/red boxes | Vanduul tech/cargo/missions (FTL rep) |
| SCHF Scale | Gang votes (ethics sims) | Rebel trials (political philosophy) | MetricsBoards/kills/reflections | Hauls/branches/polls |

Pyro for raid core; Nyx for narrative. Pitch ITC: "Faction wars + SCHF students."

### Weekly Quests (Realms)

#### Realm 1-2: Virtual Cave Spawn (Weeks 1-2)

Reality+ Ch. 1-2. Pyro setup: Character/ITCN guild. First CZ scout (Checkmate Boards 1-2). Debrief: Simulation flourishing?

#### Realm 3-5: Digital Abyss Dilemmas (Weeks 3-5)

Ch. 3-5. Pyro Turf War (CFP/Xeno); Mine Ambush. Virtue/util/deontology in raids.

#### Realm 6-8: Forge of Code Virtues (Weeks 6-8)

Ch. 6-8. Nyx Smuggler Run; Pyro Purge. Empathy/resilience via polls.

#### Realm 9-11: Pixels to Purpose (Weeks 9-11)

Ch. 9-11. Levski Escort; Vanduul Dive. Community ethics/STEAM.

#### Realm 12: Ascension

Ch. 12+. Capstone: Design SCHF event. Present in Levski bar.

### Inclusivity Codex

* Veteran/early career focus: Resilience themes, career STEAM ties.
* Hybrid: Esports lab or solo PTU; audio Reality+, gear loans.
* Standards: Common Core (argument eval in debriefs).

### Codex of Conduct

* Guild respect: Debate avatars/ideas.
* Accessibility: Summaries, flexible roles.
